product_analysis: The product appears to be a minimalist round smartwatch with a clean modern design. Brand name and logo are not visible on the provided image, so the watch must remain unbranded exactly as shown. The watch has a circular face with a solid black blank screen on the front view. The case is metallic silver with a smooth polished finish and slim profile. The lugs are short and angular, connecting to a white silicone or matte rubber strap. The strap is bright white, smooth, and features multiple elongated rectangular adjustment holes. The buckle is silver-toned and matches the case. A second rear-facing view of the same watch is visible, showing the back casing in matte or satin silver and confirming the same white strap design. Key integrity details to preserve: perfectly round case, silver metal body, black inactive display, white strap, exact hole placement style, minimalist no-logo appearance, clean premium tech aesthetic. The product must look EXACTLY like the input image, maintaining all original labels, colors, and branding details.
